title: Remove wolfssl_openssl_extra from CFB cfg gates
description: Two locations need updating after cfb.rs is rewritten: (1) wolfcrypt/src/cipher/mod.rs lines 69-72: change #[cfg(all(wolfssl_openssl_extra, wolfssl_aes_cfb))] to #[cfg(wolfssl_aes_cfb)] for both the mod cfb; and pub use cfb::*; lines. (2) wolfcrypt-conformance/tests/cipher_cfb.rs: the cfb_equiv! macro invocations gate on [wolfssl_openssl_extra, wolfssl_aes_cfb] and [wolfssl_openssl_extra, wolfssl_aes_cfb, wolfssl_aes_192] — remove wolfssl_openssl_extra from all three. Run cargo test -p wolfcrypt-conformance --test cipher_cfb to verify all cross-validation tests pass against the cfb-mode crate oracle.
